title: Record a ZDR privacy posture contract
prompt: Create reports/zdr-privacy-contract.md with sections for Default telemetry, Opt-in analytics, /status privacy gate, and Local evidence only.

fixtureActions.content:
# ZDR Privacy Contract

## Default telemetry
Telemetry OFF by default for ZDR-friendly local runs.

## Opt-in analytics
SUPERLIORA_TELEMETRY=1 enables opt-in analytics; otherwise local-only.

## /status privacy gate
/status shows Privacy telemetry ON/OFF and footer `zdr` badge when offline.

## Local evidence only
Evidence stays in project-local paths; no remote exfil by default.
